creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Thank you for your submission.

If you are the maintainer of this port, please update your Bugzilla account email address to match the port MAINTAINER line.

Once complete, please maintainer-approval to "+" on the attachment to approve it as maintainer.

This can be done with Attachment -> Details -> maintainer-approval [+]

Please also confirm this change passes QA (poudriere, portlint)
